tasks.title: Migracion DB: Facility → Sede
tasks.description: ALTER TABLE facilities RENAME TO sedes. Renombrar columnas relacionadas. Actualizar FKs. Crear migration file en backend/migrations/000XX_rename_facility_to_sede.sql

tasks.title: Migracion DB: ServiceUnit v2 (expand columns)
tasks.description: ALTER TABLE service_units ADD COLUMN type, capacity, schedule_template, is_shared, resource_ids. Expand from current minimal schema.
acceptance: Default values set for existing rows

tasks.title: Migracion DB: Bridge tables (professionals + resources)
tasks.description: CREATE TABLE service_unit_professionals (service_unit_id, professional_id, role). CREATE TABLE physical_resources (id, name, type, sede_id, quantity). CREATE TABLE service_unit_resources (service_unit_id, resource_id).
acceptance: service_unit_professionals table created with M:N FKs

tasks.title: Refactor Facility → Sede (domain + repo + handler + sqlc)
tasks.description: Rename Facility entity to Sede throughout backend: domain/facility.go → domain/sede.go, repository, usecase, handler, DTOs, routes. Update all references. Use graphify to find all affected nodes (~180 nodes in #32).
acceptance: All 'Facility' references renamed to 'Sede' in Go code

tasks.title: Expand ServiceUnit domain (38 → full entity)
tasks.description: Expand ServiceUnit from minimal 38-node implementation: add fields (type, capacity, schedule_template, is_shared), expand repository queries, add usecases (Create, Update, GetBySede, AssignProfessional, AssignResource). Follow Clean Architecture pattern from patient domain.
acceptance: ServiceUnit domain entity has all required fields
Repository: Create, GetByID, GetBySede, Update, Delete, ListBySede

tasks.title: Service-Unit-Professionals M:N relationship
tasks.description: Implement M:N bridge: domain value object ProfessionalAssignment, repository methods (Assign, Unassign, ListByUnit, ListByProfessional), usecase logic for assignment validation.
acceptance: One professional can be in multiple UAs (different schedules)

tasks.title: Physical Resources CRUD (laser, salas, instrumentacion)
tasks.description: Create PhysicalResource domain entity: id, name, type (laser|room|equipment), sede_id, quantity, is_bookable. Repository + usecase + handler + DTOs. Full CRUD.

tasks.title: Availability Service (conflict detection)
tasks.description: Core business logic: prevent double-booking of professionals across UAs, prevent double-booking of physical resources. Transactional check before appointment creation. Uses service_unit_professionals + service_unit_resources + appointments.

tasks.title: API Endpoints: Sede CRUD
tasks.description: GET /api/v1/sedes, POST /api/v1/sedes, GET /api/v1/sedes/:id, PATCH /api/v1/sedes/:id, DELETE /api/v1/sedes/:id. Scoped by client_id from auth context. Uses pkg/response.

tasks.title: API Endpoints: UnidadAsistencial CRUD + relationships
tasks.description: GET /api/v1/sedes/:sede_id/unidades, POST, PATCH, DELETE. Plus: POST /unidades/:id/professionals (assign), DELETE /unidades/:id/professionals/:pid. Plus: POST /unidades/:id/resources (assign).

tasks.title: Backend test suite Phase 1 (≥85%)
tasks.description: Comprehensive tests for all Phase 1 domain code. Service/usecase ≥85%, repository ≥80%, handler ≥75%. Include conflict detection edge cases.

tasks.title: Seeds: sedes + UAs + recursos
tasks.description: Create seed data for testing: 3 sedes, 8 UAs (mixed types), 5 physical resources (laser, sala cirugia, sala rx, consultorio), 10 professionals with assignments.

tasks.title: Frontend: Modelo Sede (interface + SignalStore)
tasks.description: Create TypeScript interface Sede, ServiceUnit, PhysicalResource. Create SignalStore for sede state (current sede, list, loading). Follow existing pattern from patient store.
acceptance: SignalStore with loadAll, create, update, delete

tasks.title: Frontend: Admin Sede CRUD component
tasks.description: Standalone Angular component for sede management. List view + create/edit modal. OnPush change detection. data-testid on all interactive elements. Uses Angular 19 control flow (@if, @for).

tasks.title: Frontend: Admin Unidad Asistencial CRUD
tasks.description: List filtered by sede, create/edit modal with professional assignment (multi-select) and resource assignment.

tasks.title: Frontend: Admin Recursos Fisicos
tasks.description: CRUD for physical resources (laser, salas, equipos) scoped to sede.

tasks.title: Frontend: Selector de Sede en topbar
tasks.description: Global sede selector dropdown in topbar. Persists to SignalStore. All admin screens filter by selected sede.
acceptance: Reactive: child components respond to sede change

tasks.title: Frontend test suite Phase 1 (≥75%)
tasks.description: Vitest component tests for all Phase 1 components. Coverage ≥75% for components.
